_comment: Controls which LOD levels and mesh types are downloaded for 3D assets.
_note: LOD 0 = highest detail, higher numbers = lower detail / fewer triangles.
_lod_normals_comment: LOD normal maps are downloaded only for the LOD levels listed in 'lods'.
_albedo_lods_comment: Some assets have per-LOD albedo remaps (usually LOD4+). Set albedo_lods to include them.
_include_highres_comment: Download the raw high-resolution scan mesh (_High.fbx). Large file, not needed for game use.
_include_ztool_comment: Download the ZBrush .ztl sculpt file if available for this asset.
